characters.name: Albino
characters.description: TheAlbinois a prisoner who rules the prison to whichLucas Hoodis sent, and is ordered byMr. Rabbitto terrorize Hood upon his arrival. He is first introduced to Hood when Rabbit visits the prison, telling Hood he will suffer in his time in prison, and insinuating that the Albino is on his payroll. Rabbit has some inmates beat Hood, and after a short while, sends the Albino ahead. The Albino easily blocks Hood's punch with his elbow, seemingly hurting Hood's hand in the process, and then proceeds to hold him and slice into his flesh with a razor blade. While cutting Hood, he notifies him that he knows "exactly how deep to go" as not to kill him. Hood spends some time in the infirmary after the incident, where his attending physician tells him his days are numbered, and he is only protected from the Albino in the infirmary and in solitary confinement.

characters.name: Sugar Bates
characters.description: Sugar Batesis a wise, powerful former boxer and ex-con who now owns the local watering hole. It's in his bar where the actual Lucas Hood is killed. He befriends Sheriff Lucas Hood. He lets Hood live in a storage attic, next to the bar. He has a prior history with Kai Proctor. Sugar Bates is a major character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourth season. He is played by starring cast memberFrankie Faison.

characters.name: Billy B
characters.description: Billy Bis a fellow prisoner to Hood and a lover ofThe Albino, and refers to himself as one of "his bitches" to Hood. ↵Unfortunately for him, Hood uses him to get time in solitary confinement (To protect himself from the Albino until he is better prepared), and cuts his right cheek with a razor blade from his mouth to his ear. (Making half of a "Glasgow smile") By that Hood gains 4 months in solitary confinement and time to plan and train to his showdown with the Albino. Billy B is a minor character in the first season. He is played by guest starMichael Roark.

characters.name: Eljay Boedicker
characters.description: Eljay Boedickeris a handsome but scruffy, outgoing, and charming musician who plays bass guitar in a Pennsylvania punk band. He had a relationship toRebecca Bowman. Eljay Boedicker is a minor character in thefourth season. He is played by supporting cast memberJesse Boyd.

characters.name: Julius Bonner
characters.description: CaptainJulius Bonneris the New York City police officer who investigated the original jewelry robbery that putLucas Hoodin prison. Julius Bonner is a recurring character in thesecondandthird season. He is played by guest cast memberReg E. Cathey.

characters.name: Elijah Bowman
characters.description: Elijah Bowmanis an Amish farmer. He is the father ofRebecca Bowman. Elijah Bowman is a recurring character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourthseasons. He is played by guest starSteve Coulter.Jim McKenywas originally cast in the role but was then replaced by Coulter. McKeny was later asked to play a different role.[1]

characters.name: Miriam Bowman
characters.description: Miriam Bowmanis the mother ofRebecca Bowman. Miriam Bowman is a recurring character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourthseasons. She is played by supporting cast memberSamantha Worthen.

characters.name: Rebecca Bowman
characters.description: Rebecca Bowmanis a former local Amish girl, in her early 20s who lives a devout life by day, but is a rebellious, active adventurous party girl by night, often acting promiscuously towards local town sheriff and outlaw,Lucas Hood, to the point of developing actual feelings for him. She used to live with her fatherElijah Bowmanin Banshee. She now lives with her uncle,Kai Proctor. It was originally believed that she was killed byDeclanandLilith Bodein a satanic ritual, but in factClay Burtonkilled her, because he thought she was holding Kai back from getting things done. It is later revealed upon her death and autopsy, that she was pregnant with Lucas' child, although given her incestuous relationship with her uncle, there is a chance Kai was the father. Rebecca Bowman is a major character in thefirst,second,thirdandfourth season. She is played by starring cast memberLili Simmons[1].

characters.name: Solomon Bowman
characters.description: Solomon Bowmanis the brother ofRebecca Bowmanand the son ofElijahandMiriam Bowman. He is living in Banshee. Soloman Bowman is a recurring character in thefirst,secondandthirdseasons. He is played by co-starGunnar Carrigan.

characters.name: Raymond Brantley
characters.description: Raymond Walton Brantleyis a mob kingpin from Oregon with a deadly mobile agenda. Raymond Brantley is a minor character in thethird season. He is played by guest cast memberShuler Hensley.

characters.name: Raymond Brantley

characters.name: Calvin Bunker
characters.description: Calvin Bunkerwas the second in the command of the Brotherhood in Banshee and the younger brother ofKurt Bunker. He had a wife,Maggie Bunkerand a son named Hank. His father-in-law,Randall Watts, was the leader of the Brotherhood in Banshee. On the surface Calvin seems like a mild-mannered husband and father who provides for his family. However, there is actually boiling hot rage inside of him which is caused by his increasingly strained marriage with Maggie, his business relationship with Proctor, his dissatisfaction with the leader of the Brotherhood and his older brother Kurt who is trying to destroy the Brotherhood. His frustration and bitterness slowly turn into violent outbursts. When his father-in-law is released from prison and he takes over the Brotherhood, Calvin finally snaps and stabs him in the neck with an icepick. Then he proceeds to rape his wife, beat his boss up to death and cut all ties with Proctor when he gives Watts´ severed head as a gift to him.  Maggie becomes afraid of him and Kurt arranges for her to stay with her son at Brock´s house. This causes Calvin to give his brother an ultimatum.

characters.name: Kurt Bunker
characters.description: Kurt Bunker, is a Deputy for theBanshee County Sheriff Department(BSD). He has previous experience as a Deputy, working for the Dade County Sheriff, but is also a former neo-nazi skinhead. His application for the BSD deputy vacancy (created by the death of Emmett) was initially rejected with the hiring ofBilly Raven. Yet he is hired byLucas Hoodafter taking initiative at theCADIduringChayton'ssiege, which lead to the death of DeputySiobhan Kellyand therefore creating another vacancy in the department. Kurt Bunker grew up in an abusive household to a dad  who beat him regularly. In addition to this, he had a stutter, so he was also ostracized by his peers. A young man in his neighborhood, known only by the name of "Tank" took pity on young Kurt, bought him soda and talked to him about how he too can change things. One day, when Kurt's father gave his son a black eye, Tank assaulted Kurt's father, claiming "Your boy is one of ours now". Following this altercation, Kurt joined the Nazi movement Tank was a member of.

characters.name: Maggie Bunker
characters.description: Maggie Bunkeris the wife ofCalvin Bunkerand mother ofHank Bunker. Maggie desperately wants a better life for and her son. She has an affair with brother-in-lawKurt Bunker. Maggie Bunker is a recurring character in thefourth season. She is played by guest cast memberCasey LaBow.

characters.name: Maggie Bunker

characters.name: Clay Burton
characters.description: Clay Burtonis the personal assistant and bodyguard forKai Proctor. Despite his small stature and that he comes across as a quiet person, Burton displays sheer ruthlessness as seen in "Meet the New Boss" where he heads into the trailer of an MMA fighter who was arrested for rape and confronts the MMA fighter's manager where it's implied that he tortures the man. Nothing is known about Burton's life before he met Proctor except he once tried to save his father from drowning and that his father never forgave him for that. He was being tortured by the cult he grew up in and Proctor saved him. He has scars on his back from the torture he suffered and also it seems that his penis and testicles were also cut off making him a eunuch. As a result, he is highly loyal and is willing to do anything to help and protect Kai or carry out his orders. Nothing is known about Burton's life before he met Proctor except he once tried to save his father from drowning and that his father never forgave him for that. He was being tortured by the cult he grew up in and Proctor saved him. He has scars on his back from the torture he suffered and also it seems that his penis and testicles were also cut off making him a eunuch. As a result, he is highly loyal and is willing to do anything to help and protect Kai or carry out his orders. He seems detached, calm and polite on the outside, but in some cases he expresses his feelings like rage, when he found out that Rebecca was disobeying her uncle. This eventually caused him to take matters into his own hands and killRebecca Bowman, because he thought she was becoming a burden to her uncle.
